exercises.title: Micius Performance Analyzer
tasks: Calculate link budget for different pass angles
Estimate key rate vs zenith angle
hints: Link loss varies with zenith angle
Peak performance at low zenith angles
Account for atmospheric and geometric losses

exercises.title: Entanglement Distribution Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate Micius entanglement distribution to two ground stations.
tasks: Calculate coincidence rates for two stations
Include channel losses for both links
hints: Both stations must be visible simultaneously

exercises.title: Intercontinental Link Planner
exercises.description: Plan intercontinental QKD links using satellite relay.
tasks: Calculate satellite visibility for two continents
hints: Both stations need visibility (may be sequential)
Trusted relay: key = XOR of two satellite keys
LEO satellites pass over different longitudes

exercises.title: Micius Improvement Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate how improvements affect satellite QKD performance.
hints: Daytime needs spectral and temporal filtering
